summary: A clip from a Fox News broadcast. An anchor at a desk speaks beside on-screen graphics. One graphic shows a booking-style photo of a young man labeled with a name and age and a bullet reading ASSAULT AND BATTERY (9 COUNTS), credited to the Fairfax County Sheriff's Office and DHS. Other graphics show three quoted statements attributed to a parent, and a Fairfax County Public Schools statement. The lower-third reads ILLEGAL ALIEN ACCUSED OF GROPING HIGH SCHOOL GIRLS.

script.scene: An anchor speaks beside a graphic showing a booking photo and the text ASSAULT AND BATTERY (9 COUNTS).
A three-panel graphic shows quoted statements attributed to a parent under the heading about an arrest at a Virginia school.
A graphic displays a Fairfax County Public Schools statement; lower-third reads FAIRFAX SCHOOLS: WE PRIORITIZE STUDENT SAFETY.

notable_text: ASSAULT AND BATTERY (9 COUNTS); ILLEGAL ALIEN ACCUSED OF GROPING HIGH SCHOOL GIRLS; FAIRFAX COUNTY PUBLIC SCHOOLS STATEMENT; FAIRFAX SCHOOLS: WE PRIORITIZE STUDENT SAFETY; FOX NEWS ALERT
